# Migao

Migao is a Rust CLI and Windows tray app that recovers Traditional Chinese text typed with the wrong IME.

Primary links:

- Project README: https://github.com/winterdrive/migao
- Traditional Chinese README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/docs/README.zh-TW.md
- Simplified Chinese README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/docs/README.zh-CN.md
- Japanese README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/docs/README.ja.md
- Korean README: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/docs/README.ko.md
- Full LLM context: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/docs/llms-full.txt

Core workflow:

1. Launch Migao Watch on Windows.
2. Select garbled text, often with Ctrl+A.
3. Press Ctrl+Alt+R.
4. Migao replaces the selected text with recovered Chinese.

Install:

```powershell
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/install.ps1 | iex
```
